2025-26 Air Force Falcons Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 3-29 (0-20, 12th in MWC MBB)

Coach: Joe Scott (3-17), Jon Jordan (0-12)

PS/G: 61.5 (364th of 365)

PA/G: 79.9 (329th of 365)

SRS: -13.75 (321st of 365)

SOS: 4.59 (93rd of 365)

ORtg: 91.3 (363rd of 365)

DRtg: 118.5 (359th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +200000
